messages.content: i want a model of appoinment letter
Sure, what do you need the appointment letter model for? Is it for a specific purpose or just for reference? Additionally, what kind of information do you want the appointment letter to include?

Your employment with Thaiba Moral Academy will commence on [start date]. Your work schedule will be from Fajr to Isha per week, with working hours tailored to accommodate the operational needs of the organization. Please note that occasional work on weekends or public holidays may be required. Please short this to one small sentence

Your employment at Thaiba Moral Academy will begin on [start date]. Your work schedule will be from Fajr to Isha per week, with work hours adjusted to meet operational requirements. Occasional weekend or public holiday work may be required.

Your monthly salary during the probationary period will be INR 12,000, which will increase to INR 15,000 upon successful completion of the probationary period. Your salary will be payable on the 10th of each month.  Please short this to very smallest sentence
Your monthly salary during probation is INR 12,000, which will increase to INR 15,000 upon successful completion of probation. Salary is payable on the 10th of each month.
